variants: Celedonia Arrazola is a dedicated professional specializing in Environmental Law. Additionally, she is a proud member of the Pearlstring Planners, an organization devoted to sustainable development. Celedonia credits much of her success to her mentor and doctoral advisor, Santiago De La Cruz, who guided her throughout her academic journey.
